Describe the sequence of products shown in the video, noting the brand and product names visible on the labels at different timestamps.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the grey R+Co logo appears on screen; at 4s, a silver can labeled PURE DRY TEXTURE SHAMPOO SPRAY is shown; at 10s, a can labeled FOIL THICK STYLING CONTROL SPRAY appears; at 18s, a can labeled FOIL SILVER STAYING CONTROL SPRAY is displayed centrally.
